FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: What is the difference between Paper-Based and Computer-Based IELTS?
FAQ.a1: The format is identical, but delivery changes everything. PC tests offer copy-paste, word counts, and digital highlighting. We replicate this exact interface so you build muscle memory.
FAQ.q2: How can I pay my official test registration fee in Algeria?
FAQ.a2: The fee is ~40,000 DZD. Due to banking constraints, most pay via offline transfer or local agencies. We provide step-by-step registration guidance.
FAQ.q3: Is this course suitable for complete beginners in English?
FAQ.a3: No. This intensive sprint is strictly for candidates with intermediate English. We focus purely on exam strategy, not basic grammar.
FAQ.q4: How do your class groups protect individual learning progress?
FAQ.a4: Strictly 8 seats per cohort. This guarantees line-by-line essay correction and personalized speaking feedback from a certified instructor.
FAQ.q5: Can I join if I am facing an imminent Capago or TLScontact deadline?
FAQ.a5: Absolutely. Visa timelines are unforgiving. Our 32-hour program is built for rapid intervention to secure your certificate before your appointment.
FAQ.q6: What resources are included in the 25,000 DA tuition fee?
FAQ.a6: Covers 32 hours of dedicated PC time, diagnostic simulations, writing templates, and line-by-line feedback.
FAQ.q7: When does the Lab open, and how do I know if I got a seat?
FAQ.a7: We launch soon. If a seat opens, you'll receive a WhatsApp message with dates and payment details. We process applications in order of receipt.

About.title: About Mr.Senouci
About.subtitle: Founder & Lead Instructor
About.hook: Certified English instructor with an official Band 8.0 and a perfect 9.0 in Listening.
About.pedigree: Leveraged an Applied AI and Software Engineering background to build Oran's first computer-delivered IELTS simulation platform.
About.experience: Years of practical English teaching experience, employing a comprehensive suite of advanced pedagogical frameworks to drive rapid language acquisition.
About.edge: Strictly realistic. We set honest expectations based on your diagnostic - no false promises.
About.method: Built on rigorous diagnostics and reverse-engineered official IELTS band criteria.

Articles.title: Articles & News
Articles.article1Title: The Official Switch to IELTS on Computer
Articles.article1Text: We are pleased to announce that from 30 April 2026, all IELTS tests will be delivered exclusively on computer, providing a faster, more efficient, and streamlined testing experience. IELTS on computer offers the same test format, questions, and scoring as IELTS on paper. It also provides significant benefits at no additional cost:
